events.label: assistant
events.text:
Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`.

**Summary**: A missing knockout filler on a panelboard is a code violation (NEC 408.7 requires unused enclosure openings to be closed with an identified closure). It exposes energized bus/terminations to contact and lets in debris/moisture, compromising enclosure integrity — so this is a **fail** at medium risk, correctable before closeout by installing proper knockout seals and re-verifying clearance (110.26) and conductor identification (200.4) before final inspection.
